text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, it's time to excite everyone in the paddock
and put on a show for the audience.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, all in day's work for a first-rate
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That said, I'd come in first even if I didn't try!
